67e490f4:
def solve(grid):
    from collections import deque, Counter
    def canonical(rel):
        variants = []
        for flip in [False, True]:
            for rot in range(4):
                coords = list(rel)
                if flip:
                    coords = [(-r, c) for r, c in coords]
                for _ in range(rot):
                    coords = [(c, -r) for r, c in coords]
                mr = min(r for r,c in coords)
                mc = min(c for r,c in coords)
                norm = tuple(sorted((r-mr, c-mc) for r,c in coords))
                variants.append(norm)
        return min(variants)
    def get_components(cells):
        cell_set = set(cells)
        visited = set()
        comps = []
        for cell in cells:
            if cell in visited:
                continue
            comp = []
            q = deque([cell])
            visited.add(cell)
            while q:
                r, c = q.popleft()
                comp.append((r,c))
                for dr, dc in [(-1,0),(1,0),(0,-1),(0,1)]:
                    nr, nc = r+dr, c+dc
                    if (nr,nc) in cell_set and (nr,nc) not in visited:
                        visited.add((nr,nc))
                        q.append((nr,nc))
            comps.append(comp)
        return comps
    rows, cols = len(grid), len(grid[0])
    color_counts = Counter()
    for r in range(rows):
        for c in range(cols):
            color_counts[grid[r][c]] += 1
    bg = color_counts.most_common(1)[0][0]
    non_bg_colors = [c for c in color_counts if c != bg and color_counts[c] > 10]
    template_color = None
    template_bbox = None
    for tc in non_bg_colors:
        cells = [(r,c) for r in range(rows) for c in range(cols) if grid[r][c] == tc]
        if not cells: continue
        min_r = min(r for r,c in cells)
        max_r = max(r for r,c in cells)
        min_c = min(c for r,c in cells)
        max_c = max(c for r,c in cells)
        top_ok = all(grid[min_r][c] == tc for c in range(min_c, max_c+1))
        bot_ok = all(grid[max_r][c] == tc for c in range(min_c, max_c+1))
        left_ok = all(grid[r][min_c] == tc for r in range(min_r, max_r+1))
        right_ok = all(grid[r][max_c] == tc for r in range(min_r, max_r+1))
        if top_ok and bot_ok and left_ok and right_ok:
            template_color = tc
            template_bbox = (min_r, min_c, max_r, max_c)
            break
    if template_color is None: return grid
    tr, tc_min, br, bc_max = template_bbox
    holes = [(r,c) for r in range(tr, br+1) for c in range(tc_min, bc_max+1) if grid[r][c] == bg]
    hole_comps = get_components(holes)
    hole_shapes = []
    for comp in hole_comps:
        mr = min(r for r,c in comp)
        mc = min(c for r,c in comp)
        rel = tuple(sorted((r-mr, c-mc) for r,c in comp))
        can = canonical(rel)
        hole_shapes.append((comp, can))
    scattered_by_color = {}
    for color in range(10):
        if color == bg or color == template_color: continue
        cells = [(r,c) for r in range(rows) for c in range(cols) if grid[r][c] == color]
        cells = [(r,c) for r,c in cells if not (tr <= r <= br and tc_min <= c <= bc_max)]
        if not cells: continue
        comps = get_components(cells)
        can_list = []
        for comp in comps:
            mr = min(r for r,c in comp)
            mc = min(c for r,c in comp)
            rel = tuple(sorted((r-mr, c-mc) for r,c in comp))
            can = canonical(rel)
            can_list.append(can)
        scattered_by_color[color] = can_list
    shape_color_counts = {}
    for color, can_list in scattered_by_color.items():
        for can in can_list:
            if can not in shape_color_counts:
                shape_color_counts[can] = Counter()
            shape_color_counts[can][color] += 1
    shape_to_color = {}
    for can, counts in shape_color_counts.items():
        best_color = counts.most_common(1)[0][0]
        shape_to_color[can] = best_color
    result = []
    for r in range(tr, br+1):
        row = []
        for c in range(tc_min, bc_max+1):
            row.append(grid[r][c])
        result.append(row)
    for comp, can in hole_shapes:
        if can in shape_to_color:
            color = shape_to_color[can]
            for r, c in comp:
                result[r-tr][c-tc_min] = color
    return result
